description: Executes a bash command from the project root by default and returns output. Use for terminal/program execution, not routine file search/read/write/edit operations.

command.description: The bash command to execute. Prefer dedicated agent tools for finding, searching, reading, editing, or writing files.

workdir.description: Optional working directory for the process. Omit unless the command must run from a specific directory. Use this instead of 'cd <dir> && <command>'. Do not use when the command already uses absolute paths for commands and files. Relative paths are resolved from the project root; absolute paths may require user permission.

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds. If omitted, the default timeout is 120 seconds.

background.description: Optional background wait time in seconds. Use 0 to return immediately with PID and status. Use N > 0 to wait up to N seconds, then return collected output, PID, and running status.

max_output.description: Maximum returned output size in bytes before saving full output to .cswdata/worktmp/. Default is 2048 bytes. Use 0 only when unlimited output is necessary.
